title: Real-world simulation: Software development
abstract: The abstract is published online only. If you did not include a short abstract for the online version when you submitted the manuscript, the first paragraph or the first 10 lines of the chapter will be displayed here. If possible, please provide us with an informative abstract. Students who triumph at school may flunk in the workplace. Undergraduates who excel at university do not necessarily excel at work, and vice versa. In a opinion survey of 400 employers in the US, the majority felt that recent college graduates were ill-prepared for the workplace. Researchers have also pointed out that university graduates have difficulty applying the skills learnt in higher education settings in real-world situations.
